# ZeQue - Heritage & Attraction Ticket Booking Platform

> ZeQue is a digital platform for discovering, exploring, and booking instant entry tickets for museums, historical monuments, forts, and cultural experiences across India.

## Key Resources & Navigation

- [Home Page](https://zeque.in/): Primary landing page with search and featured heritage sites.
- [States Index](https://zeque.in/states): Explore experiences and monuments grouped by Indian states.
- [Cities Index](https://zeque.in/cities): Browse attractions across major heritage cities.
- [Categories Index](https://zeque.in/categories): Filter attractions by type (Museums, Forts, Palaces, Temples).
- [XML Sitemap](https://zeque.in/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable catalog of all indexed attraction URLs.

## Platform Capabilities

- Instant online ticket booking and digital pass generation.
- Slot selection and queue-less entry management.
- Dynamic location-aware recommendations for local attractions.
